title: Ascher USB Rechargeable Bike Light Set, Super Bright Front Headlight and Rear LED Bicycle Light,650mah Lithium Battery,4 Light Mode Options(2 USB cables and 4 Strap Included)
features: Advanced design: USB rechargeable light, built in 650mAh rechargeable lithium battery for each light.

Four light mode options: The Headlight and Taillight feature an one-touch switch with four different lighting modes depending on your preference. Include full brightness, half brightness, fast flashing and slow flashing.
Waterproof: Designed to reach an IPX4 waterproof level, this bicycle light is ideal for riding in rainy or foggy conditions, allowing you to enjoy your ride.

Easy installation: The silicone mount straps are designed with two openings that tightly fit around many size seat posts, handlebars, seat risers, backpacks, helmets and stretch to keep lights secure and firm. They can be easily loosen and fasten, and no tools are required.

Mutifunction: This bike light set is versatile enough for cycling, hiking, camping, or any outdoor activity and can be used as emergency flashlight. This is great for cycling at night or in places where visibility and safety are concern. So, just start your next adventure with us.

Ascher USB Rechargeable Bike Light Set Merchant video Previous page Next page 1 Waterproof 2 Rechargeable Battery 3 Discharge Time Previous page Next page Warning: Not suitable for children under 10 years. For use under adult supervision What precautions should I take when charging? Please insert and remove the charging cable gently to avoid loosening the charging port, which may lead to poor charging. Keep the port dry while charging and ensure you are using the included USB cable. What should I do if my bicycle light charges slowly or won't charge at all? If your bicycle light won't charge, please first ensure that the charging cable, charging adapter, and socket are working properly. Then try using a different charging cable, charging adapter, or socket. The charging port is a little loose. Will this affect its use? Slight looseness is within the normal physical tolerance and will not affect functionality. However, please avoid frequent forceful plugging and unplugging to prevent accelerated wear. I noticed the product getting warm during charging. Is this normal? It's normal for the lamp body to get slightly warm during charging. However, if you notice the lamp body getting abnormally hot, or if you hear sparks or unusual noises, please stop charging immediately. My product seems to have a shorter battery life after using it for a while. If you feel the battery life is shorter, please first check if the light is fully charged. Normally, battery life is greatly affected by usage time; it's normal for battery life to decrease with increased usage. Package Contents 1 X Head light (white light) 1 X Tail light (red light) 2 X USB Cables 4 X Silicone Mounting Strap 1 X Instruction Manual
